name: eggd_chr_prefix
title: eggd_chr_prefix
summary: Adds or removes the 'chr' prefix from a BAM file header using samtools reheader.

inputSpec.name: input_file
inputSpec.label: Input single BAM file
inputSpec.help: The single BAM file to add or remove the 'chr' prefix from.

inputSpec.name: input_file_array
inputSpec.label: Input BAM file array
inputSpec.help: Provide an array of BAM files to add or remove the 'chr' prefix from

inputSpec.name: mode
inputSpec.label: Prefix Edit Mode
inputSpec.help: Choose 'add_chr' to convert format to chr1-22/chrX/chrY/chrM. Choose 'remove_chr' to convert format to 1-22/X/Y/MT.

outputSpec.name: output_files
outputSpec.label: Output modified BAM files
outputSpec.help: The resulting BAM files with modified headers.

outputSpec.name: output_indices
outputSpec.label: Output modified BAM indices
outputSpec.help: The BAI index files for the modified BAM files.
